config.face-mouse.name: Face Mouse When Attack
config.face-mouse.tooltip: When enabled, the character will face the mouse direction when attacking
config.weapon-autoswing.name: Weapon Autoswing
config.weapon-autoswing.tooltip: When enabled, holding down the attack button will continuously use the weapon's light attack
config.enable-weapons.name: Allow Moving for Weapons
config.enable-weapons.tooltip: Whether to allow moving when using weapons
config.enable-tools.name: Allow Moving for Tools
config.enable-tools.tooltip: Whether to allow moving when using tools
